'''navate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:planographically|planographically]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| n-v-t
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:planographically|planographically]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| navate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:navate|navate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:navatesher|navatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:navatesherĂ«m|navatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:navatero|navatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:navateshĂ«|navateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:navateshĂ«m|navateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokinavatero|gokinavatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokinavateshĂ«|gokinavateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokinavateshĂ«m|gokinavateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gonavankerom|gonavankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gonavankeshĂ«|gonavankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gonavankeshĂ«m|gonavankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gonavankeya|gonavankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:navaterom|navaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:navatemu|navatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:navateya|navateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokinavaterom|gokinavaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokinavatemu|gokinavatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokinavateya|gokinavateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:navavate|navavate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:navavatesher|navavatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:navavatesherĂ«m|navavatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:navavatero|navavatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:navavateshĂ«|navavateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:navavateshĂ«m|navavateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokinavavatero|gokinavavatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokinavavateshĂ«|gokinavavateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokinavavateshĂ«m|gokinavavateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gonavavankerom|gonavavankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gonavavankeshĂ«|gonavavankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gonavavankeshĂ«m|gonavavankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gonavavankeya|gonavavankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:navavaterom|navavaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:navavatemu|navavatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:navavateya|navavateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokinavavaterom|gokinavavaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokinavavatemu|gokinavavatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokinavavateya|gokinavavateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:nĂŠvĂŠte|nĂŠvĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:nĂŠvĂŠtesher|nĂŠvĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:nĂŠvĂŠtesherĂ«m|nĂŠvĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:nĂŠvĂŠtero|nĂŠvĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:nĂŠvĂŠteshĂ«|nĂŠvĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:nĂŠvĂŠteshĂ«m|nĂŠvĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokinĂŠvĂŠtero|gokinĂŠvĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokinĂŠvĂŠteshĂ«|gokinĂŠvĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokinĂŠvĂŠteshĂ«m|gokinĂŠvĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gonĂŠvĂŠnkerom|gonĂŠvĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gonĂŠvĂŠnkeshĂ«|gonĂŠvĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gonĂŠvĂŠnkeshĂ«m|gonĂŠvĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gonĂŠvĂŠnkeya|gonĂŠvĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:nĂŠvĂŠterom|nĂŠvĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:nĂŠvĂŠtemu|nĂŠvĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:nĂŠvĂŠteya|nĂŠvĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokinĂŠvĂŠterom|gokinĂŠvĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokinĂŠvĂŠtemu|gokinĂŠvĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokinĂŠvĂŠteya|gokinĂŠvĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:nafvafte|nafvafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:nafvaftesher|nafvaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:nafvaftesherĂ«m|nafvaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:nafvaftero|nafvaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:nafvafteshĂ«|nafvafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:nafvafteshĂ«m|nafvafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokinafvaftero|gokinafvaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokinafvafteshĂ«|gokinafvafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokinafvafteshĂ«m|gokinafvafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gonafvafnkerom|gonafvafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gonafvafnkeshĂ«|gonafvafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gonafvafnkeshĂ«m|gonafvafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gonafvafnkeya|gonafvafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:nafvafterom|nafvafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:nafvaftemu|nafvaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:nafvafteya|nafvafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokinafvafterom|gokinafvafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokinafvaftemu|gokinafvaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokinafvafteya|gokinafvafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
